latest.title: Lava turns seawater into boiling rock
latest.script_key: new land in 30 seconds watch that red river hit the water it doesn t just cool it explodes the lava s outer crust hardens fast that s why it looks like glass shards popping off that steam cloud isn t just steam it s superheated salt and minerals blasting out would you walk on this in an hour

latest.title: Lava waterfalls build land faster than you think
